user.description: Build the Agentic Enterprise. Stay up to date with news and resources for Salesforce Developers.

tweets.text:

🔹 Powers AI agents across multiple experiences
🔹 Embeds Salesforce workflows beyond the traditional UI

tweets.text:

🔹 Set up a React app on Salesforce from scratch
🔹 Configure an Agentforce Employee Agent with https://t.co/qNnFqDM0UR

tweets.text:
📱 Accelerate mobile development with Mobile Skills, now GA. 

Use simple prompts to generate native mobile projects with authentication, offline support, and the @Salesforce Mobile SDK built in - so you can spend less time on setup and more time building.

Learn more: https://t.co/wrFBMJN2xF
tweets.name: Salesforce Developers

tweets.text:
AI agents need a trusted way to discover and connect with capabilities across organizational boundaries. 🔎

That's why @Salesforce has partnered with @Google and other industry leaders on the new Agentic Resource Discovery (ARD) specification.

Learn what it means for Agentforce https://t.co/lHh8g5lOpK
tweets.name: Salesforce Developers

tweets.text:
🤖 Bring @Salesforce into your AI coding agent with Headless 360.

In Episode 2 of Salesforce Headless 360 Decoded, Charles Watkins shows how to connect Claude Code, Cursor, and other AI coding agents to Salesforce using the Salesforce Skills Library and Salesforce DX MCP Server. https://t.co/SEMGttw5a6
tweets.name: Salesforce Developers

tweets.text:
State Managers are now generally available in Lightning Web Components (LWC). 🎉

Spend less time wiring components together and more time building. Share state across component trees without property drilling, custom events, or pub/sub workarounds.

Get started: https://t.co/0v8KGPazis
tweets.name: Salesforce Developers
